name: Haystack
long_description:
Haystack helps teams review and merge more code without lowering quality.

As AI-generated pull requests become more common, code review shifts from reading every line to deciding what actually deserves human attention.

Haystack uses full codebase context and agent traces to recover author intent, verify changes, and route only the risky or ambiguous work to reviewers.

Teams use it to keep standards high while moving faster through a growing volume of changes.
one_liner: AI review layer that decides which code changes need human attention
